ui.text: Move piece left four times.
Move piece right four times.
Rotate piece in XY positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in XY negative direction four times.
Soft-drop four times.
ui.hint: Press Soft Drop 4 times for controlled descent.

ui.text: Hard-drop once.
ui.hint: Press Hard Drop once to lock quickly.

ui.text: Cycle through all grid modes.
ui.hint: Start from OFF and press Toggle Grid four times: EDGE, FULL, HELPER, then OFF again.

ui.text: Set locked-cell transparency to minimum allowed.
ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency down until you reach the minimum allowed value.

ui.text: Set locked-cell transparency to maximum allowed.
ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency up until you reach the maximum allowed value.

ui.text: remove one full line.
ui.hint: Move and rotate the piece into the hole, then Hard Drop to clear exactly one line.

ui.text: clear the full prepared board.
ui.hint: Move and rotate into the prepared hole, then Hard Drop to clear the full board.

ui.text: place the piece into the highlighted target.
ui.hint: Use movement and rotation, then Hard Drop to complete the target.

ui.text: Move piece left four times.
Move piece right four times.
Move piece depth-away four times.
Move piece depth-closer four times.
Rotate piece in XY positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in XY negative direction four times.
Rotate piece in XZ positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in XZ negative direction four times.
Rotate piece in YZ positive direction four times.
Rotate piece in YZ negative direction four times.
Soft-drop four times.
ui.hint: Press Soft Drop 4 times for controlled descent.

ui.text: Hard-drop once.
ui.hint: Press Hard Drop once to lock quickly.

ui.text: Rotate camera yaw fine negative four times.
Rotate camera yaw negative four times.
Rotate camera yaw positive four times.
Rotate camera yaw fine positive four times.
Rotate camera pitch negative four times.
Rotate camera pitch positive four times.
Rotate the board with the mouse.
ui.hint: Hold Right Mouse Button and keep moving the mouse for at least 2 seconds.

ui.text: Zoom the board with the mouse wheel.
ui.hint: Keep scrolling the Mouse Wheel for at least 2 seconds to zoom the board.

ui.text: Zoom in four times.
Zoom out four times.
Reset camera once.
Set locked-cell transparency to minimum allowed.
ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency down until you reach the minimum allowed value.

ui.text: Set locked-cell transparency to maximum allowed.
ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency up until you reach the maximum allowed value.

ui.text: Cycle through all grid modes.
ui.hint: Start from OFF and press Toggle Grid four times: EDGE, FULL, HELPER, then OFF again.

ui.text: place the piece into the highlighted target.
ui.hint: Use movement and rotation, then Hard Drop to complete the target.

ui.text: remove one full layer.
ui.hint: Move and rotate into the prepared gap, then Hard Drop to clear one full 3D layer.

ui.text: clear the full prepared board.
ui.hint: Move and rotate into the prepared hole, then Hard Drop to clear the full board.

ui.text: Move the falling shape left four times.
ui.hint: Press the Move Left control 4 times.

ui.text: Move the falling shape right four times.
ui.hint: Press the Move Right control 4 times.

ui.text: Move the falling shape farther away four times.
ui.hint: Press the Move Away control 4 times.

ui.text: Move the falling shape closer four times.
ui.hint: Press the Move Closer control 4 times.

ui.text: Move the falling shape to the previous W layer four times.
Move the falling shape to the next W layer four times.
Turn the falling shape in the flat XY plane four times.
Turn the falling shape in the flat XY plane the other way four times.
Turn the falling shape in the XZ plane four times.
Turn the falling shape in the XZ plane the other way four times.
Turn the falling shape in the YZ plane four times.
Turn the falling shape in the YZ plane the other way four times.
Turn the falling shape in the XW plane four times.
ui.hint: This is a 4D turn. Press Rotate XW + 4 times.

ui.text: Turn the falling shape in the XW plane the other way four times.
ui.hint: This is a 4D turn. Press Rotate XW - 4 times.

ui.text: Turn the falling shape in the YW plane four times.
ui.hint: This is a 4D turn. Press Rotate YW + 4 times.

ui.text: Turn the falling shape in the YW plane the other way four times.
ui.hint: This is a 4D turn. Press Rotate YW - 4 times.

ui.text: Turn the falling shape in the ZW plane four times.
ui.hint: This is a 4D turn. Press Rotate ZW + 4 times.

ui.text: Turn the falling shape in the ZW plane the other way four times.
ui.hint: This is a 4D turn. Press Rotate ZW - 4 times.

ui.text: Move the shape down slowly four times.
ui.hint: Press Soft Drop 4 times for a controlled fall.

ui.text: Drop and lock the shape once.
ui.hint: Press Hard Drop once to place the shape immediately.

ui.text: Pan the camera a little to the left four times.
Pan the camera left four times.
Pan the camera right four times.
Pan the camera a little to the right four times.
Tilt the camera with Pitch - four times.
Tilt the camera with Pitch + four times.
Change to another 4D viewing angle four times with XW-.
Change to another 4D viewing angle four times with XW+.
Change to another 4D viewing angle four times with ZW-.
Change to another 4D viewing angle four times with ZW+.
Rotate the board with the mouse.
ui.hint: Hold the right mouse button and keep moving the mouse for at least 2 seconds.

ui.text: Zoom the board with the mouse wheel.
ui.hint: Keep scrolling the mouse wheel for at least 2 seconds.

ui.text: Cycle through all grid modes.
ui.hint: Start from OFF and press Toggle Grid four times: EDGE, FULL, HELPER, then OFF again.

ui.text: Zoom in four times.
Zoom out four times.
Reset the camera once.
ui.hint: Press Reset View once to go back to the default angle.

ui.text: Set locked-cell transparency to the minimum allowed value.
ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency down until you reach the minimum allowed value.

ui.text: Set locked-cell transparency to the maximum allowed value.
ui.hint: This stage starts at 50%. Press transparency up until you reach the maximum allowed value.

ui.text: Place the shape into the highlighted target.
ui.hint: Use movement and rotation, then press Hard Drop to finish the target.

ui.text: Clear one full hyper-layer.
ui.hint: Move and rotate into the prepared gap, then press Hard Drop to clear one full 4D hyper-layer.

ui.text: Clear the whole prepared board.
ui.hint: Move and rotate into the prepared hole, then press Hard Drop to clear the whole board for a bonus.
